However, the Bader charge displays that there is a strong electronic
interaction between Mo atom and other transition metals of dimer for the heteronuclear DACs. The synergistic
effect of the heteronuclear DACs originates from the enhancement of the intermetallic interaction between the
Mo atom and other transition metals. The work offers rational guideline for the synthesis of DACs with excellent
catalytic performances, and has great potential for application in various catalytic fields.
